tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Hi. This is just my interpretation of the song, but i think it sounds very accurate.

Artist: Savage Garden
Song: Crash and Burn
Capo: 4th Fret
Tuning: Standard


[Intro]

[ch]Csus2[/ch], [ch]G[/ch], [ch]Am[/ch], [ch]F[/ch]


[Verse]
         
[tab]         [ch]Csus2[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
When you feel all alone[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
And the world has turned it's back on you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
Give me a moment please to tame your wild wild heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
I know you feel like the walls are closing in on you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Csus2[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
It's hard to find relieve and people can be so cold[/tab]


[Pre Chorus]

[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]A#sus2[/ch]
When darkness is upon your door and you feel like you can't take anymore[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]      
Let me be the one you call[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]Csus2[/ch]
If you jump I'll break your fall[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Csus2[/ch]
Lift you up and fly away with you into the night[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]
If you need to fall apart[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Csus2[/ch]
I can mend a broken heart[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
If you need to crash then crash and burn[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Csus2[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
You're not alone[/tab]


[Verse]
         
[tab]         [ch]Csus2[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
When you feel all alone[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
And a loyal friend is hard to find[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Csus2[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
You're caught in a one way street[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
With the monsters in your head[/tab]


[Pre Chorus]

[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
When hopes and dreams are far away and[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]A#sus2[/ch]
You feel like you can't face the day[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]      
Let me be the one you call[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]Csus2[/ch]
If you jump I'll break your fall[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Csus2[/ch]
Lift you up and fly away with you into the night[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]
If you need to fall apart[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Csus2[/ch]
I can mend a broken heart[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
If you need to crash then crash and burn[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
You're not alone[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Because there has always been heartache and pain[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A#sus2[/ch]                [ch]Csus2[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
And when it's over you'll breathe again[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Csus2[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
You'll breath again[/tab]


[Pre Chorus]

[tab]          [ch]Csus2[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
When you feel all alone[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
And the world has turned it's back on you[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Csus2[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Give me a moment please[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
To tame your wild wild heart[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]      
Let me be the one you call[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]Csus2[/ch]
If you jump I'll break your fall[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Csus2[/ch]
Lift you up and fly away with you into the night[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]
If you need to fall apart[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Csus2[/ch]
I can mend a broken heart[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
If you need to crash then crash and burn[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Csus2[/ch]
You're not alone[/tab]



Play Chorus until song fades out
